info.name: ApplicationService
Argo CD List Returns List of Applications

params.name: name
params.description: the application's name.

params.name: refresh
params.description: forces application reconciliation if set to 'hard'.

params.name: projects
params.description: the project names to restrict returned list applications.

params.name: resourceVersion
params.description: when specified with a watch call, shows changes that occur after that particular version of a resource.

params.name: selector
params.description: the selector to restrict returned list to applications only with matched labels.

params.name: repo
params.description: the repoURL to restrict returned list applications.

params.name: appNamespace
params.description: the application's namespace.

params.name: project
params.description: the project names to restrict returned list applications (legacy name for backwards-compatibility).

items.docs: Argo CD List Returns List of Applications

info.name: Argo CD Update Updates an Application

params.name: application.metadata.name
params.description:
Name must be unique within a namespace. Is required when creating resources, although
some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name
automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration
definition.
Cannot be updated.
More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names#names

info.name: Argo CD PodLogs Returns Stream of Log Entries for the Specified Pod. Pod

params.name: sinceTime.seconds
params.description:
Represents seconds of UTC time since Unix epoch
1970-01-01T00:00:00Z. Must be from 0001-01-01T00:00:00Z to
9999-12-31T23:59:59Z inclusive.

params.name: sinceTime.nanos
params.description:
Non-negative fractions of a second at nanosecond resolution. Negative
second values with fractions must still have non-negative nanos values
that count forward in time. Must be from 0 to 999,999,999
inclusive. This field may be limited in precision depending on context.

items.docs: Argo CD PodLogs Returns Stream of Log Entries for the Specified Pod. Pod

info.name: Argo CD ValidateAccess Validates Access to a Repository with Given Parameters

params.name: repo
params.description: The URL to the repo

params.name: username
params.description: Username for accessing repo.

params.name: password
params.description: Password for accessing repo.

params.name: sshPrivateKey
params.description: Private key data for accessing SSH repository.

params.name: insecure
params.description: Whether to skip certificate or host key validation.

params.name: tlsClientCertData
params.description: TLS client cert data for accessing HTTPS repository.

params.name: tlsClientCertKey
params.description: TLS client cert key for accessing HTTPS repository.

params.name: type
params.description: The type of the repo.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the repo.

params.name: enableOci
params.description: Whether helm-oci support should be enabled for this repo.

params.name: githubAppPrivateKey
params.description: Github App Private Key PEM data.

params.name: githubAppID
params.description: Github App ID of the app used to access the repo.

params.name: githubAppInstallationID
params.description: Github App Installation ID of the installed GitHub App.

params.name: githubAppEnterpriseBaseUrl
params.description: Github App Enterprise base url if empty will default to https://api.github.com.

params.name: proxy
params.description: HTTP/HTTPS proxy to access the repository.

params.name: project
params.description: Reference between project and repository that allow you automatically to be added as item inside SourceRepos project entity.

params.name: gcpServiceAccountKey
params.description: Google Cloud Platform service account key.

params.name: forceHttpBasicAuth
params.description: Whether to force HTTP basic auth.

params.name: useAzureWorkloadIdentity
params.description: Whether to use azure workload identity for authentication.

params.name: bearerToken
params.description: BearerToken contains the bearer token used for Git auth at the repo server.

params.name: insecureOciForceHttp
params.description: Whether https should be disabled for an OCI repo.

params.name: azureServicePrincipalClientId
params.description: Azure Service Principal Client ID.

params.name: azureServicePrincipalClientSecret
params.description: Azure Service Principal Client Secret.

params.name: azureServicePrincipalTenantId
params.description: Azure Service Principal Tenant ID.

params.name: azureActiveDirectoryEndpoint
params.description: Azure Active Directory Endpoint.

items.docs: Argo CD ValidateAccess Validates Access to a Repository with Given Parameters
